freeService.heading: Free Service
freeService.body: All tools on THRJTech are provided free of charge. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice.

privacyCore.heading: Privacy as a Core Value
privacyCore.body: Most of our tools operate entirely in your browser — no files are uploaded to our servers. For tools that require server-side processing (such as PDF compression or merging), files are processed on short-lived infrastructure and are permanently and automatically deleted within 30 minutes. We do not view, store, or share the contents of any uploaded files.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.body: You agree to use this site lawfully and not to upload or process content that infringes on copyrights, contains malware, or violates the rights of others.

noWarranty.heading: No Warranty
noWarranty.body: The tools are provided 'as-is' without any warranties of accuracy, reliability, or fitness for a particular purpose.

limitedLiability.heading: Limitation of Liability
limitedLiability.body: THRJTech is not liable for any loss of data or damages arising from your use of these tools.

changes.heading: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of any revisions.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Questions? Contact us using the form available on this website.
